items.example: The symphony orchestra plays at the concert hall.
There's a new art gallery opening in the city centre.
The botanical garden has plants from all over the world.
Kids love going to the theme park during the holidays.
Teenagers hang out at the skate park after school.
The local swimming pool is open until 9 p.m.
The sports centre has a gym, a pool and tennis courts.
Let's go to the cinema to see the new film.
We booked tickets for the theatre next Saturday.
There's an amusement arcade with video games near the beach.
